sections.paragraph:
ἀναϰύπτω [ἀνά, κύπτω] ‘to lift oneself up’

—a. physically: of standing in an erect position’, stand erect, straighten oneself Lk 13:11 (of a body bent by an ailment); stand up, get up J 8:7, 10 (opp. κύπτω bend over, stoop, vs. 6).

—b. in imagery of one’s spirits that are ‘lifted’, be elated, look up Lk 21:28 (opp. of ‘faint’ from fear, vs. 26).
